hero.subtitle: Allotly connects to your OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Azure accounts and puts you in control — per person, per model, per dollar.

problem.stat1Desc: spent on enterprise LLM APIs in just the first half of 2025
problem.stat2Desc: of companies have no responsive AI controls in place
problem.stat3Desc: of executives say over a quarter of their spend delivers no value

solution.label: THE SOLUTION
solution.title: One control plane. Every AI provider. Total spend visibility.
solution.subtitle: Whether your team uses OpenAI for code generation, Anthropic for analysis, Gemini for research, or Azure for enterprise deployments — Allotly gives you a single pane of glass to manage budgets, distribute access, and track every dollar.

features.label: TWO ACCESS MODELS
features.title: Internal Teams. External Users. One Dashboard.

teams.name: Allotly Teams
teams.subtitle: Managed AI Access
teams.desc: Your team uses Allotly proxy keys to call OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Azure through one unified endpoint. Real-time budget enforcement, automatic token clamping, and per-member spend tracking — all built in.
teams.bullet1: One API key per member — works with every provider
teams.bullet2: Real-time budget enforcement on every request
teams.builtFor: Built for: engineering teams, R&D groups, and internal governance workflows.
teams.footnote: Uses Allotly proxy keys with real-time budget enforcement on every request.

vouchers.name: Allotly Vouchers
vouchers.subtitle: Instant Access Codes
vouchers.desc: Create voucher codes that give anyone instant AI access with hard budget limits. Recipients call one unified API that works with all providers. Real-time per-request metering ensures nobody goes over budget.
vouchers.bullet3: No provider accounts needed for recipients
vouchers.builtFor: Built for: hackathons, workshops, contractors, agencies, and partner programs.
vouchers.footnote: Uses Allotly thin proxy with real-time spend tracking. Budget enforced per-request.

voucherCallout.title: Think Gift Card. But for AI.
voucherCallout.desc: Allotly Vouchers let you give anyone a pre-loaded AI budget — a code they redeem for instant API access. No accounts to create, no provider credentials to share. Just scan, redeem, and start prompting.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to AI spend control.

team.step1Desc: Link your OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Azure accounts. API keys encrypted with AES-256-GCM at rest.
team.step2Desc: Add members, assign per-person budgets, restrict models. Members get scoped provider keys automatically.
team.step3Desc: Unified dashboard with spend tracking. Automatic alerts at 80%, key revocation at 100% budget.

voucher.step1Desc: Generate voucher codes with budget limits and model restrictions. Attach to bundles for purchase.
voucher.step2Desc: Share via code, QR, or email. Recipients redeem and get an API key instantly — no provider accounts needed.
voucher.step3Desc: Per-request budget metering. Token clamping near limits. Auto-expiry when budget hits zero.

arenaCallout.title1: The cheapest model that still nails your prompt?
arenaCallout.desc: Pick a prompt, pick the contenders, and watch Allotly route the same request through every major provider on a single key. You see latency and quality side-by-side. We tally the cost in real time. It's the simplest way to feel what a unified AI proxy actually does for your team.
arenaCallout.ctaSubtext: Free demo mode · Bring your own key for live races

trust.subtitle: Allotly is a control plane, not a data plane. We manage access and budgets — your content flows directly between you and the AI provider.
trust.card1Desc: The proxy forwards requests in real time and only records metadata: model, token count, and cost. No prompts, no completions, no conversation history is ever stored.
trust.card2Desc: The proxy forwards requests in real time. Nothing is stored — no prompts, no completions, no conversation history. Only metadata: model, token count, cost.
trust.card3Desc: AES-256-GCM encryption for stored keys. Full audit trail for every admin action. GDPR-compliant architecture. SOC 2 Type II on the roadmap.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

team.name: Team
team.description: For growing teams with multiple admins
team.feature2: $20 per each additional Team Admin, limited to 9 new teams

pricing.voucherBundlesCta: You can buy Vouchers from any plan. <link>Click here</link> to buy the $10 Voucher Bundle with pre-loaded AI credit packs you can buy and distribute.

testimonial1.challenge: Runs workshops and hackathons monthly. Needs to give 200+ attendees instant AI access without creating accounts or managing credentials.
testimonial1.solution: Creates voucher codes with per-person budgets and 24-hour expiry. Attendees redeem a link and start coding in 60 seconds. Jon sees every dollar from his dashboard.
testimonial1.result: 200 attendees onboarded in 5 minutes. Zero surprise bills.

testimonial2.challenge: 12-person engineering team using GPT-4o and Claude across three projects. Was burning $4K/month with zero visibility into who was spending what.
testimonial2.solution: Connected OpenAI and Anthropic in Allotly, created project-based teams, and set per-engineer budgets of $200/month with model restrictions per role.
testimonial2.result: 40% cost reduction. Full spend visibility. No workflow changes for engineers.

testimonial3.challenge: 8 client teams, each needing different AI models and budgets. Billing was a nightmare — impossible to attribute spend to individual projects.
testimonial3.solution: Uses voucher codes per client engagement — each team gets scoped access with project-specific budgets and model allowlists. Internal team uses direct keys.
testimonial3.result: Crystal-clear per-client billing. Teams + Vouchers from one dashboard.

finalCta.subtitle: Get full visibility and control over your organization's AI spend in minutes. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: The AI spend control plane for teams and organizations.
